libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Extend the existing native-test runtime/system-property setup to cover libraryVersion 5.0.1 as well as 5.0.0: pass -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true to the native test executable. Tests can use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer on 127.0.0.1 with ephemeral ports for HTTP, forms, multipart, redirects, sessions, and caching; no external server is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The unsafe-access properties are primarily relevant to Java 25/current-defaults native-image runs, so JVM tests alone may not expose the issue.
Avoid optional feature paths that require non-transitive optional/test dependencies such as vertx-auth-oauth2 or jackson-databind unless the test explicitly adds and justifies those dependencies.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage, but 5.0.1 still resolves Netty 4.2.x like 5.0.0, and the existing scaffold documents Java 25 native runs need Netty unsafe-access system properties.
